banner.message: International software house for digital ecosystems, applied AI, and design with purpose.

intro.desc1: Web Star Studio designs platforms, automations, and interfaces with international ambition. Data-led strategy, applied AI, and design with purpose operate here as one system.

items.title: Strategy
items.label: BUSINESS & DIRECTION
items.desc: Business diagnosis, positioning, and roadmap architecture before any execution begins.

items.title: Design
items.label: UI/UX SYSTEMS
items.desc: Premium interfaces with clear hierarchy, strong narrative, and focus on trust, decision flow, and conversion.

items.title: Engineering
items.label: SCALABLE DELIVERY
items.desc: Front-end and full-stack implementation with strong performance budgets and resilient structure.

items.title: Automation
items.label: APPLIED INTELLIGENCE
items.desc: Intelligent workflows, integrations, and operating layers designed to remove friction and manual overhead.

items.title: Trust
items.label: QUALITY & GOVERNANCE
items.desc: Quality standards, accessibility, security, and visual consistency supporting every release.

homeRoutes.description: The home page remains cinematic. Inner routes organise proof, context, and information with far more clarity.

hero.title: Digital architecture for predictable growth
hero.description: We build custom digital ecosystems that unify strategy, development, automation, and design inside one delivery model.
hero.aside: Built around diagnosis, senior execution, and measurable design intent.
hero.statementEnd: , explore, and craft ideas with intent.

offerings.title: Workstreams
offerings.description: Every engagement starts from real context, never a generic package.

items.title: Web platforms and systems
items.description: Custom digital products focused on performance, scale, and operational clarity.

items.title: Process automation
items.description: Integrations, workflows, and intelligent layers that reduce friction and increase execution speed.

items.title: AI applied to business
items.description: Artificial intelligence implementations connected to operations, sales, service, and decision support.

items.title: Strategic UI/UX
items.description: Interfaces designed to convert better, guide better, and strengthen the brand with intent.

items.title: Digital ecosystem architecture
items.description: Systems, tools, and infrastructure arranged to perform as one coherent environment.

items.title: Web and mobile delivery
items.description: Cross-platform experiences built for usability, maintainability, and measurable business impact.

sections.title: Web platforms and systems
sections.descriptionPrimary: We design and build custom digital products where performance, usability, and operational clarity are treated as part of the same system.
sections.descriptionSecondary: The work usually spans information architecture, interface systems, technical foundations, and backend logic so the platform can scale without losing coherence.

sections.title: Process automation
sections.descriptionPrimary: Automation projects remove repeated manual work, connect fragmented tools, and reduce execution friction across the company.
sections.descriptionSecondary: We map the bottlenecks first, then translate them into reliable flows, triggers, integrations, and exception handling that teams can actually trust.

sections.title: AI applied to business
sections.descriptionPrimary: Applied AI should improve real decisions and operations, not sit beside them as a disconnected experiment.
sections.descriptionSecondary: We connect intelligent layers to service, sales, knowledge retrieval, internal analysis, and support workflows with clear boundaries and measurable outcomes.
subservices: AI assistants for operations and support

sections.title: Strategic UI/UX
sections.descriptionPrimary: Interface design is treated as architecture: how users move, how information is framed, and how confidence is built at each step.
sections.descriptionSecondary: We combine brand sensitivity with technical realism so design systems, prototypes, and shipped interfaces stay aligned from concept through launch.

sections.title: Digital ecosystem architecture
sections.descriptionPrimary: When companies outgrow isolated tools, we design a clearer operating model where systems, infrastructure, and data behave as one environment.
sections.descriptionSecondary: That means defining ownership, integration logic, technical priorities, and future-ready foundations before complexity starts compounding.

pillars.title: The logic behind the work
pillars.description: Webstar's value comes from combining these layers at the same level of rigor.

items.title: Data-led strategy
items.description: Before proposing, we diagnose the business, the audience, the market pressure, and the real signals that matter.

items.title: Automation with AI
items.description: We use applied intelligence to simplify operations, evolve workflows, and unlock consistent performance.

items.title: Design with purpose
items.description: Every interface decision is made to strengthen the brand, improve the experience, and move the right metrics.

delivery.title: How each project is structured
delivery.description: Lean enough to move fast, rigorous enough to reduce risk.

items.title: Strategic diagnosis
items.description: Business context, goals, bottlenecks, current stack, and repositioning or operational opportunities.

items.title: System definition
items.description: Information architecture, interface narrative, technical scope, and implementation priorities.

items.title: Build and iterate
items.description: Design and engineering running in parallel with performance, quality, and coherence checkpoints.

items.title: Launch and evolve
items.description: A business-oriented release with the foundation ready for operation, learning, and future cycles.

faq.title: Important alignment before we begin
faq.description: Answers rewritten around the updated brand positioning.

items.question: What kinds of projects do you take on?
items.answer: We take on web platforms, custom systems, web and mobile applications, automation, integrations, UI/UX, and digital ecosystem architecture. Our scope stays focused on systems, experience, and technical operation.

items.question: What do you need to get started?
items.answer: Business context, the primary objective, your current stack, relevant constraints, and any material that improves diagnosis. The proposal is shaped from that understanding.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: It depends on scope. Leaner engagements may take one to two weeks; fuller platforms often land between four and twelve weeks.

items.question: How does investment work?
items.answer: Every project receives a custom investment model. We do not compete on price with generic shops; we optimize for value, technical clarity, and long-term impact.

cta.title: Let's map the right system for your context

hero.title: An international studio for digital development
hero.description: Web Star Studio operates as a sophisticated software house for companies that need smarter, clearer, and more sustainable digital ecosystems.
hero.aside: We work as development partners with technical depth, strategic range, and real ownership over execution.

positioning.title: Real growth needs systems, not improvisation
positioning.description: Our structure combines diagnosis, build, and design under the same operating governance.
positioning.pitch: We design platforms, systems, and automations that turn companies into more predictable growth machines, with global vision, local execution, and uncompromising consistency.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Turn companies into more predictable growth engines through intelligent digital ecosystems.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Become a global reference for companies seeking digital relevance, technical sophistication, and sustainable growth.

promise.title: Commitment
promise.description: Deliver with clarity, ownership, and quality without diluting the brand.

values.title: How we run the work
values.description: Consistency comes from principles, not improvisation.

items.title: Intentional disruption
items.description: We do not deliver the obvious. We challenge assumptions and open more ambitious paths.

items.title: Technical excellence
items.description: Quality is an obligation. Every delivery should reflect strong standards in both technology and design.

items.title: Applied intelligence
items.description: AI and automation only matter when they solve real problems and improve business outcomes.

items.title: Strategic partnership
items.description: We do not operate as a transactional vendor. We stay connected to the business objective.

items.title: Global vision, local execution
items.description: International experience paired with precise reading of each company's reality.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Clear communication, defined ownership, and accountability for what gets aligned.

founder.title: Strategic direction with multidisciplinary depth
founder.description: Webstar is led by a perspective that connects business, technology, and practical execution.
founder.name: Felipe Antunes
founder.bio: Felipe Antunes leads Web Star Studio with more than 15 years of international experience in digital platforms, automation, and business-facing artificial intelligence. His background in Law, Business Administration, and an MBA in AI for Business gives the company a rare blend of technical and strategic judgment.

presence.title: International structure, local reading
presence.description: We operate through hubs and remote specialist cells to stay strategically close and operationally flexible.

items.detail: Base for leadership, strategy, and product direction.
International bridge for partnerships and European business articulation.
Access point to enterprise operations and growth environments.
Distributed specialists assembled according to each project's real needs.

testimonials.title: Trust built through delivery
testimonials.description: A small selection of feedback that reinforces clarity, speed, and execution quality.

items.quote: An incredible experience. They understood the brand vision and delivered a website that truly reflects our values and goals.
items.author: Thays Zancanaro

items.quote: Excellent results, creative and professional team, very attentive throughout the process. Everything felt deeply aligned with what we needed.
items.author: Thyago Cortez

items.quote: Attentive, fast, and patient from start to finish. The delivery came in ahead of schedule and with a very high standard of quality.
items.author: Taniana Perasolo

manifesto.text: High standards. Clear ownership. Constant curiosity. We build real systems for real companies without sacrificing visual sophistication or technical depth.
